query: VHS scanlines TV static analog distortion CRT screen
message: sub:analog_degradation/VHS_CRT — anti_aesthetic — scanlines, TV static, color bars, pixel grids, retro CRT

response.objective_caption: An extreme close-up of parallel dark diagonal strips with metallic beveled edges, separated by thin lines of spectral color including cyan, blue, yellow, and magenta. Matte charcoal surfaces show subtle texture between angular silver-gray borders, framed by neutral gray fields in the upper right and lower left corners.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: An abstract photograph that abandons representational clarity in favor of pure form, showing an extreme close-up of parallel dark diagonal strips with metallic beveled edges and thin rainbow-colored refractions. The magnification and tight framing render the subject unrecognizable, emphasizing diagonal line repetition, spectral fringe colors, matte surface texture, and geometric angular precision over any identifiable object.
